X-COMPLAINANT, JAVIER GUTIERREZ RE- COVER FROM CITY TOYOTA, INC THE SUM OF $3,485 PLUS ATTY'S FEES & COSTS PUR 2983.4 CIVIL CODE. SEE JUDGMENT
